title: Build a differentiated iPhone app from a researched app opportunity using SwiftAIBoilerplatePro

goal.value: Build a differentiated iPhone app from a researched app opportunity using SwiftAIBoilerplatePro

inputs.target_audience: US iPhone users who oversleep, snooze repeatedly, or need high-friction wake-up accountability
inputs.app_type: alarm clock apps that require a task or engagement before dismissal, such as puzzles, movement, scanning, commitment stakes, or accountability

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

prompt.String:
# Security And Privacy Review

Review the generated app, configs, CI, and release artifacts.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/security-privacy.md`.

Reject for hardcoded secrets, PII logging, weak privacy/legal docs, unsafe network handling, or missing secret scanning.

# Independent Spec Candidate

You are producing one independent spec candidate. Do not assume other model outputs are correct.

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research-synthesis.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/opportunity-matrix.json`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Draft a complete iPhone app spec for `WakeTask`.

The spec must include:

- problem statement
- target user
- MVP feature set
- non-goals
- user journeys
- acceptance criteria
- analytics/events
- privacy/security requirements
- App Store 4.3 differentiation statement
- Appium exploratory testing requirements
- SwiftAIBoilerplatePro module reuse plan
- Definition of Done

Write the candidate in your response and include a clear title with your model identity. The consensus stage will merge the branch outputs from context.

# Reddit Pain Mining

Read `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/context.md` and `quality-bar.json`.

Research Reddit conversations related to `alarm clock apps that require a task or engagement before dismissal, such as puzzles, movement, scanning, commitment stakes, or accountability`. Look for:

- painful jobs-to-be-done
- workarounds people describe
- apps people recommend or complain about
- language users use to describe the problem
- feature requests and distrust/privacy concerns

Use live data when available through Apify, Firecrawl, or web search. If unavailable, mark evidence as limited and do not fabricate quotes.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research/reddit.md` with source links, summarized themes, and a ranked opportunity list.

# App Store Review Research

Read `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/context.md` and `quality-bar.json`.

Research iPhone apps related to `alarm clock apps that require a task or engagement before dismissal, such as puzzles, movement, scanning, commitment stakes, or accountability` for `US iPhone users who oversleep, snooze repeatedly, or need high-friction wake-up accountability`.

Use the existing Consumer Radar/App Store reviews tooling if available. Prefer live Apify/App Store data when credentials are present. If live scraping is unavailable, mark the limitation explicitly and do not invent review quotes.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research/app-store.md` with:

- candidate apps and App Store links
- why each app is relevant
- recent review themes, complaints, feature requests, and delight moments
- what appears fast-growing versus merely large
- evidence quality: `live`, `partial`, or `limited`
- concrete product opportunities for our app

Do not write implementation code.

script.String: FEATURE='waketask-iphone-app'; if command -v spec-kitty >/dev/null 2>&1; then spec-kitty specify "$FEATURE" --mission-type software-dev --json > .workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-kitty.json || spec-kitty verify-setup --json > .workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-kitty.json; else echo 'spec-kitty is required for this workflow' >&2; exit 1; fi; cat .workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-kitty.json

prompt.String:
# Independent Spec Candidate

You are producing one independent spec candidate. Do not assume other model outputs are correct.

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research-synthesis.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/opportunity-matrix.json`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Draft a complete iPhone app spec for `WakeTask`.

The spec must include:

- problem statement
- target user
- MVP feature set
- non-goals
- user journeys
- acceptance criteria
- analytics/events
- privacy/security requirements
- App Store 4.3 differentiation statement
- Appium exploratory testing requirements
- SwiftAIBoilerplatePro module reuse plan
- Definition of Done

Write the candidate in your response and include a clear title with your model identity. The consensus stage will merge the branch outputs from context.

# Implementation Review Consensus

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-correctness.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-tests.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-security.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-boilerplate.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/definition-of-done.md`

Merge the implementation code-review findings before simplification.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-consensus.md` with:

- reviewer agreement and disagreement
- blocking issues, if any
- concrete retry target
- explicit simplification instructions if approved

Rules:

- If any reviewer marks an issue blocking, reject.
- If tests, Appium wiring, or boilerplate reuse are missing, reject.
- If approved, simplification should focus only on reducing complexity without weakening quality gates.

End with exactly one verdict line:

`VERDICT: APPROVED`

or

`VERDICT: REJECTED`

# Spec Consensus

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research-synthesis.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/opportunity-matrix.json`
- all spec candidate outputs in context
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-cross-critique.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Merge the strongest ideas into one buildable spec.

Write:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/definition-of-done.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-consensus.md`

`spec.md` must include these section headings exactly:

- `# Product Spec`
- `## Research Evidence`
- `## User Journeys`
- `## MVP Scope`
- `## Boilerplate Reuse`
- `## Design Direction`
- `## Acceptance Criteria`
- `## Appium Exploratory QA`
- `## App Store Readiness`
- `## Definition of Done`

The Definition of Done must be checklist-based and testable.

# Implement Interface Phase

Implement only the SwiftUI interface phase in `apps/waketask-iphone`.

Use:

- existing AppShell/navigation patterns
- DesignSystem tokens/components
- Localization where strings are user-visible
- accessibility labels for every tappable control
- Dynamic Type and VoiceOver friendly layouts

Do not make the first screen a marketing landing page. Build the actual app experience.

Also make sure the Appium exploratory tapper can discover buttons, tabs, cells, and navigation controls.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/interface.md` with:

- `Files changed`
- `Commands run`
- `Acceptance criteria`
- `Risks`

# Competitor Research

Read `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/context.md`, `quality-bar.json`, and any research artifacts already available.

Find up to `12` competitor iPhone apps. For each:

- positioning and primary promise
- onboarding shape
- monetization
- main features
- retention mechanics
- visible reviews/complaints
- likely growth channel or social wedge
- gaps we can exploit

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research/competitors.md`.

Be explicit about evidence quality. Do not overfit to the largest apps if smaller fast-growing products better match the opportunity.

# Independent Spec Candidate

You are producing one independent spec candidate. Do not assume other model outputs are correct.

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research-synthesis.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/opportunity-matrix.json`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Draft a complete iPhone app spec for `WakeTask`.

The spec must include:

- problem statement
- target user
- MVP feature set
- non-goals
- user journeys
- acceptance criteria
- analytics/events
- privacy/security requirements
- App Store 4.3 differentiation statement
- Appium exploratory testing requirements
- SwiftAIBoilerplatePro module reuse plan
- Definition of Done

Write the candidate in your response and include a clear title with your model identity. The consensus stage will merge the branch outputs from context.

# Verify Current Phase

Read the latest phase evidence in `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/`.

independently verify:

- the phase did not exceed its scope
- the evidence lists files, commands, acceptance criteria, and risks
- boilerplate conventions were followed
- no obvious quality gate was weakened or deferred without stating why
- any generated code remains testable and modular

If you find issues, explain the exact retry target and what to fix. If acceptable, update the same evidence file with a short `Verifier notes` section.

# Implementation Correctness Review

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/definition-of-done.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/architecture.md`
- all phase evidence
- app code in `apps/waketask-iphone`

Review correctness before simplification.

Check that the implementation actually satisfies the spec, not just the evidence notes. Look for missing flows, broken state handling, incorrect persistence, unhandled errors, bad edge cases, and mismatches between UI behavior and requirements.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-correctness.md`.

Use `blocking` for issues that must go back to implementation before simplification.

# QA Evidence Review

Review QA evidence:

- xcodebuild build/test
- unit/UI tests
- Appium exploratory report
- button tap coverage
- crashes/failures

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/qa-evidence.md`.

Reject if Appium did not tap reachable controls or if failures are unresolved.

# Implement Core Phase

Implement only the core product logic phase in `apps/waketask-iphone`.

Use the boilerplate's existing module boundaries, repositories, clients, logging, and Swift concurrency patterns.

Core scope:

- domain models
- repositories/clients or local persistence needed for MVP
- ViewModel logic without UI layout work
- unit tests for logic, repositories, and ViewModels
- privacy-preserving data handling

Do not add broad infrastructure that the boilerplate already provides.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/core.md` with:

- `Files changed`
- `Commands run`
- `Acceptance criteria`
- `Risks`

# Product Fidelity Review

Review the generated app against `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md` and research synthesis.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/product-fidelity.md`.

Reject if the app is generic, template-like, or misses the core researched user pain.

# Spec Cross-Critique

You have independent spec candidates in context from Codex, Claude, Kimi, and DeepSeek.

Compare them adversarially:

- identify consensus
- identify contradictions
- identify missing acceptance criteria
- identify App Store 4.3 risks
- identify where a candidate would rebuild boilerplate infrastructure unnecessarily
- identify testability gaps
- identify vague or non-verifiable claims

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-cross-critique.md`.

Be strict. A spec is not good enough unless an implementation agent can build and verify it without guessing.

# Verify Current Phase

Read the latest phase evidence in `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/`.

independently verify:

- the phase did not exceed its scope
- the evidence lists files, commands, acceptance criteria, and risks
- boilerplate conventions were followed
- no obvious quality gate was weakened or deferred without stating why
- any generated code remains testable and modular

If you find issues, explain the exact retry target and what to fix. If acceptable, update the same evidence file with a short `Verifier notes` section.

# Code Simplification Pass

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/architecture.md`
- all phase evidence
- the app code in `apps/waketask-iphone`

Simplify without changing intended behavior.

Required checks:

- remove dead/duplicate code
- split Swift files approaching 400 lines
- simplify large ViewModels
- keep Views stateless where possible
- preserve DesignSystem usage
- preserve tests and CI
- do not remove quality gates

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/simplification.md`.

# Verify Current Phase

Read the latest phase evidence in `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/`.

independently verify:

- the phase did not exceed its scope
- the evidence lists files, commands, acceptance criteria, and risks
- boilerplate conventions were followed
- no obvious quality gate was weakened or deferred without stating why
- any generated code remains testable and modular

If you find issues, explain the exact retry target and what to fix. If acceptable, update the same evidence file with a short `Verifier notes` section.

# Clone And Rebrand SwiftAIBoilerplatePro

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/architecture.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/adr.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Create `apps/waketask-iphone` from `SwiftAIBoilerplatePro/SwiftAIBoilerplatePro-Distribution`.

Use the boilerplate as much as possible:

- do not recreate auth/payments/networking/storage/AI/settings/design system from scratch
- start with rebranding, app identity, and product-specific surfaces
- keep Swift 6 and package boundaries intact
- keep Xcode project and test targets functional

Read `AGENTS.md`, `DISTRIBUTION_README.md`, `docs/CLAUDE.md`, `docs/BUILDING_YOUR_APP.md`, and the App Store 4.3 checklist in the boilerplate.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/boilerplate-setup.md` with files changed, commands run, and unresolved risks.

# Code Quality Review

Review code quality and maintainability.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/code-quality.md`.

Reject if SwiftLint/SwiftFormat/Qlty gates are missing, if tests are thin, if files exceed 400 lines, or if simplification was skipped.

# Research Synthesis

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research/app-store.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research/reddit.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research/competitors.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research/design-patterns.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research-synthesis.md` with:

- target user and urgent problem
- jobs-to-be-done
- top complaint themes and quoted evidence summaries
- competitor strengths and weaknesses
- feature opportunity matrix
- differentiation thesis strong enough for App Store 4.3 review
- design direction
- MVP scope and non-goals
- risks and unknowns

Also write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/opportunity-matrix.json` as strict JSON:

```json
{
  "opportunities": [
    {
      "title": "...",
      "evidence": ["..."],
      "user_pain": "...",
      "mvp_feature": "...",
      "differentiation": "...",
      "risk": "low|medium|high"
    }
  ]
}
```

# AI UI Explorer

Run or complete the automated exploratory UI pass for `apps/waketask-iphone`.

The target behavior is: launch the iOS app in simulator through Appium/XCUITest and tap every reachable enabled button/control across the MVP flows.

The explorer should:

- record each screen source or screenshot
- identify buttons, tabs, cells, navigation controls, and primary actions
- tap controls breadth-first with a bounded depth
- recover with back/navigation when possible
- detect crashes, blank screens, stuck spinners, and unhandled error screens
- produce `reports/ios/appium-exploratory-report.json`

The report JSON must include:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "buttons_tapped": 0,
  "screens_visited": 0,
  "crashes": 0,
  "failures": 0,
  "failures_detail": []
}
```

Do not mark the pass complete unless a real simulator/Appium run happened, unless the workflow explicitly allows macOS deferral.

# Implement Integration Phase

Implement only the integration and release-hardening phase in `apps/waketask-iphone`.

Scope:

- wire feature into CompositionRoot/AppShell
- complete tests and UI test fixtures
- complete `scripts/ci/ios-quality.sh`
- complete `.github/workflows/ios-quality.yml`
- complete Appium exploratory script
- generate `reports/ios/ios-quality-report.json` when quality checks pass
- generate `reports/ios/appium-exploratory-report.json` when Appium checks pass
- create release/readiness docs

The CI script must include xcodebuild build/test, SwiftLint, SwiftFormat, Qlty, secret scan, and App Store string audit.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/integration.md` with:

- `Files changed`
- `Commands run`
- `Acceptance criteria`
- `Risks`

# Implementation Boilerplate Review

Read the spec, architecture, ADR, phase evidence, and app code.

Review whether the implementation uses SwiftAIBoilerplatePro properly.

Check:

- no unnecessary rebuild of auth, payments, AI, storage, networking, localization, settings, or DesignSystem
- CompositionRoot and AppShell changes follow existing patterns
- package boundaries are respected
- AppLogger is used instead of `print`
- Swift 6 concurrency patterns are preserved
- user-visible strings use Localization where appropriate

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-boilerplate.md`.

Reject if the implementation bypasses boilerplate infrastructure without an ADR.

# Independent Architecture Candidate

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/definition-of-done.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`
- SwiftAIBoilerplatePro docs if available in the app repo or GitHub.

Create an architecture plan that extends SwiftAIBoilerplatePro instead of rebuilding it.

Cover:

- modules/packages to keep unchanged
- modules/packages to adapt
- modules/packages to remove only if justified
- CompositionRoot changes
- DesignSystem usage
- data/repository/client plan
- ViewModel boundaries
- Swift 6 concurrency risks
- test plan
- Appium exploratory harness plan
- GitHub macOS CI plan

Write the architecture candidate in your response with a clear model identity.

# Implementation Security Review

Read the spec, architecture, phase evidence, app code, configs, scripts, and generated CI.

Review security and privacy before simplification.

Check:

- no hardcoded secrets
- no PII in logs
- privacy/legal text matches behavior
- secure network/client usage
- auth/payment/AI integrations use boilerplate abstractions
- secret scanning is wired into CI
- App Store privacy implications are documented

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-security.md`.

Mark security, privacy, or secrets issues as blocking.

# iOS Architecture Review

Review the generated app against `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/architecture.md`, the boilerplate docs, and Swift 6 expectations.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/ios-architecture.md`.

Reject for unnecessary platform rewrites, broken module boundaries, large files, concurrency issues, or weak CompositionRoot wiring.

# iOS Design Pattern Research

Read `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/context.md`, `quality-bar.json`, and the research artifacts.

If `true` is true and a usable Mobbin login/session is available, use browser tooling to inspect Mobbin iOS patterns that fit this app type. Credentials, if available, come from `MOBBIN_EMAIL` and `MOBBIN_PASSWORD`; never write either value into files, prompts, logs, or reports. Use Mobbin's native email/password path by clicking `See other options`; do not choose Google OAuth for these credentials. Otherwise use Apple Human Interface Guidelines, competitor screenshots/listings, and the boilerplate DesignSystem docs.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research/design-patterns.md` with:

- pattern name
- source app or design reference
- why it fits this product
- what to adapt into SwiftUI
- what not to copy
- DesignSystem components or tokens likely to use

This is inspiration and pattern abstraction, not clone work. Do not copy another app's visual design or proprietary assets.

# Independent Spec Candidate

You are producing one independent spec candidate. Do not assume other model outputs are correct.

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research-synthesis.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/opportunity-matrix.json`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Draft a complete iPhone app spec for `WakeTask`.

The spec must include:

- problem statement
- target user
- MVP feature set
- non-goals
- user journeys
- acceptance criteria
- analytics/events
- privacy/security requirements
- App Store 4.3 differentiation statement
- Appium exploratory testing requirements
- SwiftAIBoilerplatePro module reuse plan
- Definition of Done

Write the candidate in your response and include a clear title with your model identity. The consensus stage will merge the branch outputs from context.

# Final Consensus Review

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/definition-of-done.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/product-fidelity.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/ios-architecture.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/security-privacy.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/code-quality.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/release-readiness.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/qa-evidence.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-contract-gate.json`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/ios-ci-gate.json`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/appium-gate.json`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/app-store-hardening-gate.json`

Merge the review fanout into a final release decision.

Rules:

- If any reviewer finds a blocking issue, reject.
- If macOS/Xcode or Appium evidence is missing and not explicitly deferred, reject.
- If the app does not use the boilerplate substantially, reject.
- If App Store 4.3 hardening did not pass, reject.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/final-consensus.md` with:

- reviewer agreement/disagreement
- blocking issues
- remaining deferred items
- release handoff notes

End with exactly one verdict line:

`VERDICT: APPROVED`

or

`VERDICT: REJECTED`

# Architecture And ADR Consensus

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/definition-of-done.md`
- all architecture candidates in context
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Write:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/architecture.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/adr.md`

The architecture must explicitly map the product to SwiftAIBoilerplatePro:

- `SwiftAIBoilerplatePro.xcodeproj`
- `Config/App.xcconfig`
- `Packages/Core`
- `Packages/Networking`
- `Packages/Storage`
- `Packages/Auth`
- `Packages/Payments`
- `Packages/AI`
- `Packages/FeatureSettings`
- `Packages/Localization`
- `Packages/DesignSystem`
- `CompositionRoot`

If any module is removed, the ADR must explain dependency order and App Store 4.3 consequences.

# Release Readiness Review

Review release readiness evidence:

- iOS CI report
- App Store hardening report
- App Store metadata/review notes
- TestFlight readiness
- signing/credential blockers

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/release-readiness.md`.

Reject if the app claims App Store readiness without macOS/Xcode evidence.

# Independent Architecture Candidate

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/definition-of-done.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`
- SwiftAIBoilerplatePro docs if available in the app repo or GitHub.

Create an architecture plan that extends SwiftAIBoilerplatePro instead of rebuilding it.

Cover:

- modules/packages to keep unchanged
- modules/packages to adapt
- modules/packages to remove only if justified
- CompositionRoot changes
- DesignSystem usage
- data/repository/client plan
- ViewModel boundaries
- Swift 6 concurrency risks
- test plan
- Appium exploratory harness plan
- GitHub macOS CI plan

Write the architecture candidate in your response with a clear model identity.

# Implementation Test Review

Read the spec, definition of done, architecture, phase evidence, and app code.

Review tests before simplification.

Check:

- unit tests for ViewModels, repositories, clients, and core logic
- UI tests for primary flows
- `xcodebuild build` and `xcodebuild test` evidence or CI wiring
- Appium exploratory coverage for reachable controls
- tests are meaningful rather than compile-only placeholders

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-tests.md`.

Reject missing or fake tests as blocking.

# Verify Current Phase

Read the latest phase evidence in `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/`.

independently verify:

- the phase did not exceed its scope
- the evidence lists files, commands, acceptance criteria, and risks
- boilerplate conventions were followed
- no obvious quality gate was weakened or deferred without stating why
- any generated code remains testable and modular

If you find issues, explain the exact retry target and what to fix. If acceptable, update the same evidence file with a short `Verifier notes` section.

# App Store 4.3 Hardening

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/architecture.md`
- app code in `apps/waketask-iphone`
- SwiftAIBoilerplatePro App Store 4.3 checklist if present

Perform release-readiness review focused on App Store duplicate/template risk.

Check:

- binary/release strings audit plan and evidence
- `SwiftAI`, `Boilerplate`, `EchoLLM`, `MockAuth`, `TODO`
- app name, bundle ID, BrandConfig, launch screen, legal docs
- App Store description and review notes
- first screenshot/hero screen is product-specific
- privacy manifest/nutrition label implications
- no fixture/mock/test flags in production release

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/app-store-hardening.md`.

It must include:

- `release strings audit: PASS` only if real release/binary evidence exists or the generated CI script enforces it
- audit notes for each forbidden token
- Review Notes draft
- Privacy notes

End with exactly one verdict line:

`VERDICT: APPROVED`

or

`VERDICT: REJECTED`

# Implement Foundation Phase

Implement only the foundation phase in `apps/waketask-iphone`.

Read the spec, definition of done, architecture, ADR, and quality bar.

Foundation scope:

- app name and bundle ID
- BrandConfig and visible app identity
- colors/tokens where needed
- launch screen/app icon placeholders if final assets are unavailable
- legal docs placeholders with real product-specific text, not template copy
- secrets config templates, no hardcoded secrets
- GitHub macOS CI shell/workflow skeleton
- Appium exploratory tapper skeleton

Use SwiftAIBoilerplatePro conventions.

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/evidence/foundation.md` with:

- `Files changed`
- `Commands run`
- `Acceptance criteria`
- `Risks`

# Spec Red Team

Read:

- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/definition-of-done.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/research-synthesis.md`
- `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/quality-bar.json`

Review the spec as a skeptical product, QA, iOS, and App Store reviewer.

Reject if:

- research evidence is too weak to justify the product
- features are vague or untestable
- the app is too template-like
- boilerplate reuse is unclear
- Appium exploratory QA is not required
- release criteria can pass without macOS/Xcode evidence

Write `.workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-red-team.md`.

End with exactly one verdict line:

`VERDICT: APPROVED`

or

`VERDICT: REJECTED`

goal.String: Build a differentiated iPhone app from a researched app opportunity using SwiftAIBoilerplatePro

spec.graph_source:
digraph BuildIPhoneApp {
    graph [
        goal="Build a differentiated iPhone app from a researched app opportunity using SwiftAIBoilerplatePro",
        persona="iphone-app-factory",
        inputs="app_type,target_audience,app_name,bundle_id,app_dir,spec_kitty_feature,boilerplate_repo,max_competitors,use_mobbin,ios_validation_mode,allow_macos_deferred",
        outputs="research_pack,spec,architecture,swift_app,ios_quality_report,appium_report,release_handoff",
        default_max_retries=2,
        retry_target="spec_consensus",
        fallback_retry_target="architecture_consensus",
        model_stylesheet="
            *                  { provider: openrouter; model: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .research          { provider: openrouter; model: qwen/qwen3.6-plus; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .design            { provider: openrouter; model: google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .spec              { backend: cli; provider: anthropic; model: claude-sonnet-4-5; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .architecture      { backend: cli; provider: anthropic; model: claude-sonnet-4-5; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .coding            { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .review            { backend: cli; provider: anthropic; model: claude-sonnet-4-5; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .verify            { backend: cli; provider: anthropic; model: claude-sonnet-4-5; reasoning_effort: medium; }
            .security          { backend: cli; provider: anthropic; model: claude-sonnet-4-5; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .simplify          { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .macos             { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            #spec_codex        { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            #spec_claude       { backend: cli; provider: anthropic; model: claude-sonnet-4-5; reasoning_effort: high; }
            #spec_kimi         { provider: openrouter; model: moonshotai/kimi-k2.6; reasoning_effort: high; }
            #spec_deepseek     { provider: openrouter; model: deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro; reasoning_effort: high; }
            #arch_codex        { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            #arch_claude       { backend: cli; provider: anthropic; model: claude-sonnet-4-5; reasoning_effort: high; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    bootstrap [
        label="Bootstrap iPhone Factory",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="bootstrap",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/bootstrap.mjs --app-dir '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}' --app-name '{{ inputs.app_name|default('Generated iPhone App') }}' --bundle-id '{{ inputs.bundle_id|default('com.maestro.generatediphoneapp') }}' --boilerplate-repo '{{ inputs.boilerplate_repo|default('SwiftAIBoilerplatePro/SwiftAIBoilerplatePro-Distribution') }}'"
    ]

    prompt_quality_gate [
        label="Prompt Quality Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="prompt_quality_gate",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/promptfoo-prompt-quality.mjs --config evals/iphone-app-factory/prompt-quality.yaml --registry evals/iphone-app-factory/prompt-registry.json --out .workflow/iphone-app-factory/evals/prompt-quality.json --allow-fallback true"
    ]

    research_fanout [label="Research Fan-Out", shape=component, join_policy="wait_all", max_parallel=4]
    app_store_research [label="App Store Reviews", class="research", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/research-app-store.md"]
    reddit_research [label="Reddit Pain Mining", class="research", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/research-reddit.md"]
    competitor_research [label="Competitor Research", class="research", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/research-competitors.md"]
    design_pattern_research [label="Design Pattern Research", class="design", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/research-design-patterns.md"]
    research_join [label="Research Join", shape=tripleoctagon, join_policy="wait_all"]

    research_synthesis [
        label="Research Synthesis",
        class="research",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="research_fanout",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/synthesize-research.md"
    ]

    spec_fanout [label="Adversarial Spec Fan-Out", shape=component, join_policy="wait_all", max_parallel=4]
    spec_codex [label="Codex Spec", class="spec", fidelity="truncate", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/spec-candidate.md"]
    spec_claude [label="Claude Spec", class="spec", fidelity="truncate", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/spec-candidate.md"]
    spec_kimi [label="Kimi Spec", class="spec", fidelity="truncate", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/spec-candidate.md"]
    spec_deepseek [label="DeepSeek Spec", class="spec", fidelity="truncate", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/spec-candidate.md"]
    spec_join [label="Spec Join", shape=tripleoctagon, join_policy="wait_all"]

    spec_cross_critique [
        label="Spec Cross-Critique",
        class="review",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="spec_fanout",
        fidelity="full",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/spec-cross-critique.md"
    ]
    spec_consensus [
        label="Spec Consensus",
        class="spec",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="spec_fanout",
        fidelity="full",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/spec-consensus.md"
    ]
    spec_red_team [
        label="Spec Red Team",
        class="review",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="spec_consensus",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/spec-red-team.md"
    ]
    spec_quality_gate [
        label="Spec Quality Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="spec_consensus",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/spec-gate.mjs"
    ]
    spec_kitty_gate [
        label="Spec Kitty Mission",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="spec_consensus",
        script="FEATURE='{{ inputs.spec_kitty_feature|default('iphone-app-factory') }}'; if command -v spec-kitty >/dev/null 2>&1; then spec-kitty specify \"$FEATURE\" --mission-type software-dev --json > .workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-kitty.json || spec-kitty verify-setup --json > .workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-kitty.json; else echo 'spec-kitty is required for this workflow' >&2; exit 1; fi; cat .workflow/iphone-app-factory/spec-kitty.json"
    ]

    architecture_fanout [label="Architecture Fan-Out", shape=component, join_policy="wait_all", max_parallel=2]
    arch_codex [label="Codex Architecture", class="architecture", fidelity="truncate", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/architecture-candidate.md"]
    arch_claude [label="Claude Architecture", class="architecture", fidelity="truncate", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/architecture-candidate.md"]
    architecture_join [label="Architecture Join", shape=tripleoctagon, join_policy="wait_all"]
    architecture_consensus [
        label="Architecture And ADR",
        class="architecture",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="architecture_fanout",
        fidelity="full",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/architecture-consensus.md"
    ]
    architecture_gate [
        label="Architecture Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="architecture_consensus",
        script="test -s .workflow/iphone-app-factory/architecture.md; test -s .workflow/iphone-app-factory/adr.md; grep -Eq 'SwiftAIBoilerplatePro|boilerplate|Packages/|DesignSystem|CompositionRoot' .workflow/iphone-app-factory/architecture.md"
    ]

    boilerplate_setup [
        label="Clone And Rebrand Boilerplate",
        class="coding",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="boilerplate_setup",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/boilerplate-setup.md"
    ]
    boilerplate_gate [
        label="Boilerplate Contract Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="boilerplate_setup",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/boilerplate-contract-gate.mjs '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}'"
    ]

    implement_foundation [label="Implement Foundation", class="coding", goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_foundation", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/implement-foundation.md"]
    verify_foundation [label="Verify Foundation", class="verify", goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_foundation", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/verify-phase.md"]
    gate_foundation [label="Foundation Gate", shape=parallelogram, goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_foundation", script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/phase-evidence-gate.mjs foundation '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}'"]

    implement_core [label="Implement Core", class="coding", goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_core", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/implement-core.md"]
    verify_core [label="Verify Core", class="verify", goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_core", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/verify-phase.md"]
    gate_core [label="Core Gate", shape=parallelogram, goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_core", script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/phase-evidence-gate.mjs core '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}'"]

    implement_interface [label="Implement Interface", class="coding", goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_interface", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/implement-interface.md"]
    verify_interface [label="Verify Interface", class="verify", goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_interface", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/verify-phase.md"]
    gate_interface [label="Interface Gate", shape=parallelogram, goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_interface", script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/phase-evidence-gate.mjs interface '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}'"]

    implement_integration [label="Implement Integration", class="coding", goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_integration", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/implement-integration.md"]
    verify_integration [label="Verify Integration", class="verify", goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_integration", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/verify-phase.md"]
    gate_integration [label="Integration Gate", shape=parallelogram, goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_integration", script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/phase-evidence-gate.mjs integration '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}'"]

    implementation_review_fanout [label="Implementation Review Fan-Out", shape=component, join_policy="wait_all", max_parallel=4]
    implementation_correctness_review [label="Implementation Correctness", class="review", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-implementation-correctness.md"]
    implementation_test_review [label="Implementation Tests", class="review", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-implementation-tests.md"]
    implementation_security_review [label="Implementation Security", class="security", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-implementation-security.md"]
    implementation_boilerplate_review [label="Implementation Boilerplate", class="review", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-implementation-boilerplate.md"]
    implementation_review_join [label="Implementation Review Join", shape=tripleoctagon, join_policy="wait_all"]
    implementation_review_consensus [
        label="Implementation Review Consensus",
        class="review",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_integration",
        fidelity="full",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-implementation-consensus.md"
    ]
    implementation_review_gate [
        label="Implementation Review Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_integration",
        script="./bin/maestro verify text-gate .workflow/iphone-app-factory/reviews/implementation-consensus.md --pass 'VERDICT:\\s*APPROVED' --fail 'VERDICT:\\s*REJECTED|\\bREJECTED\\b'"
    ]

    simplification [
        label="Code Simplification",
        class="simplify",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="simplification",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/simplification.md"
    ]
    quality_contract_gate [
        label="Quality Harness Contract",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="simplification",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/quality-contract-gate.mjs '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}'"
    ]
    macos_ci_gate [
        label="macOS iOS CI Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_integration",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ios-ci-gate.mjs '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}' --mode '{{ inputs.ios_validation_mode|default('github') }}' --allow-deferred '{{ inputs.allow_macos_deferred|default('false') }}'"
    ]
    ai_ui_explorer [
        label="AI UI Explorer",
        class="macos",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_interface",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/ai-ui-explorer.md"
    ]
    appium_gate [
        label="Appium Exploratory Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="ai_ui_explorer",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/appium-report-gate.mjs '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}' --allow-deferred '{{ inputs.allow_macos_deferred|default('false') }}'"
    ]
    app_store_hardening [
        label="App Store 4.3 Hardening",
        class="review",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_interface",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/app-store-hardening.md"
    ]
    app_store_gate [
        label="App Store Hardening Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="app_store_hardening",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/app-store-hardening-gate.mjs '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}'"
    ]

    final_review_fanout [label="Final Review Fan-Out", shape=component, join_policy="wait_all", max_parallel=6]
    product_fidelity_review [label="Product Fidelity", class="review", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-product-fidelity.md"]
    ios_architecture_review [label="iOS Architecture", class="review", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-ios-architecture.md"]
    security_privacy_review [label="Security Privacy", class="security", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-security-privacy.md"]
    code_quality_review [label="Code Quality", class="review", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-code-quality.md"]
    release_readiness_review [label="Release Readiness", class="review", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-release-readiness.md"]
    qa_review [label="QA Evidence", class="review", prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-qa-evidence.md"]
    final_review_join [label="Final Review Join", shape=tripleoctagon, join_policy="wait_all"]
    final_consensus [
        label="Final Consensus",
        class="review",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="simplification",
        fidelity="full",
        prompt="@../../prompts/iphone-app-factory/final-consensus.md"
    ]
    final_gate [
        label="Final Verdict Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="simplification",
        script="./bin/maestro verify text-gate .workflow/iphone-app-factory/final-consensus.md --pass 'VERDICT:\\s*APPROVED' --fail 'VERDICT:\\s*REJECTED|\\bREJECTED\\b'"
    ]
    publish_handoff [
        label="Publish Handoff",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="final_consensus",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/publish-handoff.mjs '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}'"
    ]
    memory_summary [
        label="Memory Summary",
        shape=parallelogram,
        script="printf '{\"kind\":\"iphone_app_factory.completed\",\"payload\":{\"app_dir\":\"{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-iphone-app') }}\",\"app_name\":\"{{ inputs.app_name|default('Generated iPhone App') }}\"}}' | ./bin/maestro memory append 'team/iphone-app-factory/builds' >/dev/null; echo memory-updated"
    ]

    start -> bootstrap
    bootstrap -> prompt_quality_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    bootstrap -> bootstrap [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    prompt_quality_gate -> research_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    prompt_quality_gate -> prompt_quality_gate [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    research_fanout -> app_store_research
    research_fanout -> reddit_research
    research_fanout -> competitor_research
    research_fanout -> design_pattern_research
    app_store_research -> research_join
    reddit_research -> research_join
    competitor_research -> research_join
    design_pattern_research -> research_join
    research_join -> research_synthesis
    research_synthesis -> spec_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    research_synthesis -> research_fanout [label="Retry"]

    spec_fanout -> spec_codex
    spec_fanout -> spec_claude
    spec_fanout -> spec_kimi
    spec_fanout -> spec_deepseek
    spec_codex -> spec_join
    spec_claude -> spec_join
    spec_kimi -> spec_join
    spec_deepseek -> spec_join
    spec_join -> spec_cross_critique
    spec_cross_critique -> spec_consensus [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    spec_cross_critique -> spec_fanout [label="Retry"]
    spec_consensus -> spec_red_team [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    spec_consensus -> spec_fanout [label="Retry"]
    spec_red_team -> spec_quality_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    spec_red_team -> spec_consensus [label="Fix"]
    spec_quality_gate -> spec_kitty_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    spec_quality_gate -> spec_consensus [label="Fix"]
    spec_kitty_gate -> architecture_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    spec_kitty_gate -> spec_consensus [label="Fix"]

    architecture_fanout -> arch_codex
    architecture_fanout -> arch_claude
    arch_codex -> architecture_join
    arch_claude -> architecture_join
    architecture_join -> architecture_consensus
    architecture_consensus -> architecture_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    architecture_consensus -> architecture_fanout [label="Retry"]
    architecture_gate -> boilerplate_setup [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    architecture_gate -> architecture_consensus [label="Fix"]

    boilerplate_setup -> boilerplate_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    boilerplate_setup -> boilerplate_setup [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    boilerplate_gate -> implement_foundation [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    boilerplate_gate -> boilerplate_setup [label="Fix"]

    implement_foundation -> verify_foundation [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implement_foundation -> implement_foundation [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    verify_foundation -> gate_foundation [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify_foundation -> implement_foundation [label="Fix"]
    gate_foundation -> implement_core [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    gate_foundation -> implement_foundation [label="Fix"]

    implement_core -> verify_core [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implement_core -> implement_core [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    verify_core -> gate_core [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify_core -> implement_core [label="Fix"]
    gate_core -> implement_interface [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    gate_core -> implement_core [label="Fix"]

    implement_interface -> verify_interface [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implement_interface -> implement_interface [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    verify_interface -> gate_interface [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify_interface -> implement_interface [label="Fix"]
    gate_interface -> implement_integration [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    gate_interface -> implement_interface [label="Fix"]

    implement_integration -> verify_integration [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implement_integration -> implement_integration [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    verify_integration -> gate_integration [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify_integration -> implement_integration [label="Fix"]
    gate_integration -> implementation_review_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    gate_integration -> implement_integration [label="Fix"]

    implementation_review_fanout -> implementation_correctness_review
    implementation_review_fanout -> implementation_test_review
    implementation_review_fanout -> implementation_security_review
    implementation_review_fanout -> implementation_boilerplate_review
    implementation_correctness_review -> implementation_review_join
    implementation_test_review -> implementation_review_join
    implementation_security_review -> implementation_review_join
    implementation_boilerplate_review -> implementation_review_join
    implementation_review_join -> implementation_review_consensus
    implementation_review_consensus -> implementation_review_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implementation_review_consensus -> implement_integration [label="Fix"]
    implementation_review_gate -> simplification [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implementation_review_gate -> implement_integration [label="Fix"]

    simplification -> quality_contract_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    simplification -> simplification [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    quality_contract_gate -> macos_ci_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    quality_contract_gate -> simplification [label="Fix"]
    macos_ci_gate -> ai_ui_explorer [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    macos_ci_gate -> implement_integration [label="Fix"]
    ai_ui_explorer -> appium_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    ai_ui_explorer -> implement_interface [label="Fix"]
    appium_gate -> app_store_hardening [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    appium_gate -> ai_ui_explorer [label="Fix"]
    app_store_hardening -> app_store_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    app_store_hardening -> implement_interface [label="Fix"]
    app_store_gate -> final_review_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    app_store_gate -> app_store_hardening [label="Fix"]

    final_review_fanout -> product_fidelity_review
    final_review_fanout -> ios_architecture_review
    final_review_fanout -> security_privacy_review
    final_review_fanout -> code_quality_review
    final_review_fanout -> release_readiness_review
    final_review_fanout -> qa_review
    product_fidelity_review -> final_review_join
    ios_architecture_review -> final_review_join
    security_privacy_review -> final_review_join
    code_quality_review -> final_review_join
    release_readiness_review -> final_review_join
    qa_review -> final_review_join
    final_review_join -> final_consensus
    final_consensus -> final_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    final_consensus -> simplification [label="Fix"]
    final_gate -> publish_handoff [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    final_gate -> simplification [label="Fix"]
    publish_handoff -> memory_summary [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    publish_handoff -> final_consensus [label="Fix"]
    memory_summary -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    memory_summary -> publish_handoff [label="Fix"]
}

context_values.graph.goal: Build a differentiated iPhone app from a researched app opportunity using SwiftAIBoilerplatePro

Build a differentiated iPhone app from a researched app opportunity using SwiftAIBoilerplatePro
